Landing.heroDescription: An open-source AI robot assistant platform — combining ESP32 hardware, real-time voice interaction, and RAG-based knowledge retrieval to support teachers and engage students.
Landing.howSubtitle: Cutting-edge AI technology brings real-time voice interaction into the classroom.
Landing.how1Desc: Voice interaction directly with the robot assistant.
Landing.how2Desc: Mic + Speaker + OLED display captures and plays audio.
Landing.how3Desc: Natural language processing with RAG knowledge retrieval.
Landing.how4Desc: Natural voice response in under 1 second.
Landing.feature1Desc: Teachers upload lecture notes — the system chunks, embeds via Qdrant, and retrieves context for accurate answers grounded in actual lesson content.
Landing.feature2Desc: Speaker identification via voice embeddings — the robot recognizes individual students and personalizes interactions, tracking learning progress.
Landing.feature3Desc: Leveraging RAG technology for fast retrieval of lecture content, stories, and educational materials — enabling accurate robot responses.
Landing.trustTitle: Safe for teachers, magical for students
Landing.trust1Desc: End-to-end encrypted system. Voice data is processed in real-time, never stored. Fully open source for transparency.
Landing.trust2Desc: Every answer is grounded in real lecture materials. The AI never fabricates — it only retrieves from the teacher's uploaded knowledge base.
Landing.ctaDescription: Let MekongAI accompany you in bringing wonderful things to the classroom.
Landing.footerTagline: Open-source AI teaching assistant platform for schools.
Landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 MekongAI. Open source under MIT License.
